title: selaginella proxima
intro: Selaginella proxima is a type of evergreen, perennial plant commonly found in tropical and subtropical regions, belonging to the family Selaginellaceae. This plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, particularly for its anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Selaginella proxima include reducing fever, alleviating respiratory issues, and acting as a natural antiseptic to treat wounds. The plant can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, or extracts for its medicinal use, although further research is needed to confirm its efficacy and potential side effects.
